ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for customer inquiries */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the brand was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the brand's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size chart belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "AU" INTEGER /* Size conversion value for Australia */,
  "US" INTEGER /* Size conversion value for United States */,
  "UK" INTEGER /* Size conversion value for United Kingdom */,
  "EU" INTEGER /* Size conversion value for Europe */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., denim, tops, dresses) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "denim_size_charts" (
  "denim_size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each denim size chart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the denim size chart belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "DENIM" INTEGER /* Denim size conversion value */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., denim, tops, dresses) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("denim_size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_denim_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_denim_size_charts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "order_total" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing purposes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the order's status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, product manager, customer service representative) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for user contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size conversion belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "AU" INTEGER /* Size conversion value for Australia */,
  "US" INTEGER /* Size conversion value for United States */,
  "UK" INTEGER /* Size conversion value for United Kingdom */,
  "EU" INTEGER /* Size conversion value for Europe */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., denim, tops, dresses) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the size conversion belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size conversion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_history" (
  "size_conversion_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion history entry */,
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion the history entry belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size conversion was updated */,
  "AU" INTEGER /* Previous size conversion value for Australia */,
  "US" INTEGER /* Previous size conversion value for United States */,
  "UK" INTEGER /* Previous size conversion value for United Kingdom */,
  "EU" INTEGER /* Previous size conversion value for Europe */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., denim, tops, dresses) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the size conversion belongs to */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the history entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_history_size_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("size_conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the category belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., denim, tops, dresses) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "product_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image (for accessibility purposes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the image was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the review belongs to */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who made the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
